title: Social Behavior and Social Play
description: Social Behavior and Social Play - Level 2

title: Play 6-M
description: Searches for a missing or corresponding toy or part of a set for 5 items or sets (e.g., a puzzle piece, a ball for a drop-in toy, a bottle for a baby doll). (E)
scoring_criteria: 1 point: Give the child 1 point if he actively and independently searches for a missing or corresponding toy or part of a set for 5 items or sets when items are removed or naturally missing. 1/2 point: Give the child 1/2 point if he actively and independently searches for a missing or corresponding toy or part of a set 2 items or sets when items are removed or naturally missing.

title: Play 7-M
description: Independently demonstrates the use of toys or objects according to their function for 5 items (e.g., placing a train on a track, pulling a wagon, holding a telephone to the ear). (O)
scoring_criteria: 1 point: Give the child 1 point if he independently demonstrates the use of toys or objects according to their function for 5 items. 1/2 point: Give the child 1/2 point if he independently demonstrates the use of toys or objects according to their function for 2 items.

title: Play 8-M
description: Plays with everyday items in creative ways 2 times (e.g., uses a bowl as a drum or a box as an imaginary car). (O)
scoring_criteria: 1 point: Give the child 1 point if he plays with 2 different everyday items in creative ways (except for stimming on a toy). 1/2 point: Give the child 1/2 point if he plays with 1 item in a creative way.

title: Play 9-M
description: Independently engages in play on structures and playground equipment for a total of 5 minutes (e.g., going down a slide, swinging). (TO: 30 min.)
scoring_criteria: 1 point: Give the child 1 point if he engages in play on play structures and playground equipment for a total of 5 minutes during a 30-minute observation. 1/2 point: Give the child 1/2 point if he engages in play on play structures and playground equipment for a total of 2 minutes during a 30-minute observation.

title: Play 10-M
description: Assembles toys that have multiple parts for 5 different sets of materials (e.g., Mr. Potato Head, Little People sets, Cooties bugs, Kid K'NEX). (O)
scoring_criteria: 1 point: Give the child 1 point if he independently constructs, assembles, or sets up toys or other play items and does so for 5 different sets of materials. 1/2 point: Give the child 1/2 point if he independently constructs, assembles, or sets up toys or other play items and does so for 2 different sets of materials.

title: Social Behavior and Social Play 6-M
description: Initiates a physical interaction with a peer 2 times (e.g., a push in a wagon, hand holding, Ring Around the Rosy). (TO: 30 min.)
scoring_criteria: 1 point: Give the child 1 point if he initiates an interaction with a peer 2 times during a 30-minute observation. Note that unprompted initiations may occur with negative events first, such as the child pushing another child off a bike in order to obtain the bike; however, do not count negative types of initiations. 1/2 point: Give the child 1/2 point if he initiates an interaction with a peer 1 time during a 30-minute observation.

title: Social Behavior and Social Play 7-M
description: Spontaneously mands to peers 5 times (e.g., My turn. Push me. Look! Come on.). (TO: 60 min.)
scoring_criteria: 1 point: Give the child 1 point if he spontaneously mands to peers 5 times during a 1-hour observation. 1/2 point: Give the child 1/2 point if he spontaneously mands to peers 2 times during a 1-hour observation.

title: Social Behavior and Social Play 8-M
description: Engages in sustained social play with peers for 3 minutes without adult prompts or reinforcement (e.g., cooperatively setting up a play set, water play). (TO: 30 min.)
